Vendors & Service Providers
Add vendor
Claude will extract the name, company, contact details, category, and key notes automatically.
Settings
Required for AI email extraction. Get yours at console.anthropic.com. Stored only in this browser's localStorage.
Scoped to the bh-tools repo only. Required to save vendors back to GitHub. Create token →
Path to the JSON file that stores your vendor data inside the repo.
